meta.title: Luma Ray3 Modify | Video-to-Video Editing | OpenCreator
meta.description: Ray3 Modify is designed for performance-preserving video-to-video workflows with keyframes and character reference. Join the waitlist on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Ray3 Modify focuses on editing real footage with AI while preserving timing, motion, and emotional intent. OpenCreator will provide access as soon as it’s available.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Designed for hybrid workflows with real performances

keyframes.title: Start & end frames
keyframes.description: Guide transitions and scene evolution with keyframe constraints.

character.title: Character reference
character.description: Lock identity and costume continuity across a shot.

performance.title: Performance preservation
performance.description: Keep timing, motion, and emotional delivery while changing the scene.

continuity.title: Continuity-aware edits
continuity.description: Reduce destabilization and maintain spatial consistency when editing footage.

editing.title: Intentional scene edits
editing.description: Modify environments, styling, and cinematography with more predictability.

pipeline.title: Production-oriented workflow
pipeline.description: Built to fit film, advertising, and VFX pipelines that require repeatability.

gallery.title: Use Cases
gallery.subtitle: Example OpenCreator scenarios that match Ray3 Modify workflows

modify.title: Scene modification
modify.useCase: Transform a shot while preserving the actor’s performance.

vfx.title: VFX-style edits
vfx.useCase: Iterate on looks and effects without re-shooting the performance.

production.title: Advertising production
production.useCase: Shoot once, personalize many variants with controlled edits.

comparison.title: Model Comparison
comparison.subtitle: How it differs from typical video-to-video workflows

pricing.title: Coming Soon
pricing.subtitle: Ray3 Modify will be available on OpenCreator soon
pricing.note: Pricing and availability will be updated once Ray3 Modify is integrated into OpenCreator.

0.question: Is Ray3 Modify available on OpenCreator?
0.answer: Not yet. This is a pre-launch landing page.

1.question: What is video-to-video used for?
1.answer: It’s often used to transform footage while preserving performance and timing.

2.question: Will keyframes be supported?
2.answer: The exact feature set will be confirmed once the integration is live.

3.question: Can I prepare workflows now?
3.answer: Yes. You can build your pipeline on OpenCreator and swap models when available.

4.question: When will it launch?
4.answer: We’ll update this page once we have confirmed availability.
